case_title: STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF GLENN E. GUTSCHE IN RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MTMOPS RAILWAY OPERATIONS INGRAM, MICHELE DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-01-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-02-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-16-2009

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT BY MAIL ON 2/26/09, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED FEB-25-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON APR-07-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-17-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-01-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-17-2009 CONTINUED TO SEP-23-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANTS MICHELE INGRAM, AND MTMOPS RAILWAY OPERATIONS; AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). THE JUN-17-2009 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF DISMISSAL AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-23-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR APR-07-2009 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
